title: Zacharias #2197
definition:
Zacharias = "remembered of Jehovah"

 1) the father of John the Baptist
 2) son of Barachias, who was slain by the Jews between the altar and
    the temple
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zacharias = "remembered of Jehovah"

 1) the father of John the Baptist
 2) son of Barachias, who was slain by the Jews between the altar and
    the temple

    NASB:  Zacharias, the father of John the Baptist, Zechariah, the son of Barachiah:
